name: Database
description: A Timestream database resource containing tables for time series data storage.

properties.name: Arn
properties.description: The Amazon Resource Name that uniquely identifies this database.

properties.name: DatabaseName
properties.description: The name of the Timestream database.

properties.name: TableCount
properties.description: The total number of tables found within the Timestream database.

properties.name: KmsKeyId
properties.description: The identifier of the KMS key used to encrypt the data stored in the database.

properties.name: CreationTime
properties.description: The time when the database was created.

properties.name: LastUpdatedTime
properties.description: The last time that this database was updated.
